title: Make gptimage-large and FLUX.1 Kontext free
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Premium pixels for the people
gist.blurb: We've unlocked the gates to the premium garden! Both gptimage-large and FLUX.1 Kontext are now completely free for everyone to use, no pollen required.
gist.summary: The gptimage-large and FLUX.1 Kontext image generation models have been moved from paid-only to the free tier.
gist.impact: All users can now generate high-quality images using these powerful models without needing a paid subscription.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee opening a treasure chest or unlocking a gate to reveal large, beautiful canvases, representing the unlocking of premium models for everyone.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot opening a wooden treasure chest, with large glowing pixel canvases and magical seeds spilling out. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot opening a wooden treasure chest, with large glowing pixel canvases and magical seeds spilling out. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
